subject: Official Job Offer: Senior Full-Stack Engineer at TechCorp Inc.
text:
Dear John Doe,

Congratulations! We are pleased to extend an official offer of employment for the Senior Full-Stack Engineer position at TechCorp Inc.. Your official offer letter is attached as a PDF.

Please review the offer letter, sign it, and upload your signed copy or respond via our system dashboard.

Warm regards,
TechCorp Inc. HR & Recruitment
html:
Employment Offer Extended!

Dear John Doe,

We are delighted to extend to you a formal offer of employment for the position of Senior Full-Stack Engineer at TechCorp Inc..

Your detailed offer letter containing compensation, benefits, and next steps has been compiled and is attached to this email as a PDF document.

Please review the attachment and check your ApexHire dashboard to submit your final response.


Congratulations once again, and we look forward to having you join us!

This is an automated notification from ApexHire recruitment platform.
